procedure.action: Check if ledger.lock exists. If it exists and its timestamp is within lock_timeout_seconds, wait retry_interval_ms and retry up to max_retries times. If it exists but is older than lock_timeout_seconds, it is stale — delete it and proceed.
Create ledger.lock containing your role name and the current ISO 8601 timestamp.
Read ledger.json and note the current sequence number.
Make your changes to the ledger data in memory. Increment the sequence number by 1. Update last_updated to the current timestamp.
Re-read ledger.json. If the sequence number has changed since step 3, another agent wrote concurrently despite the lock. Discard your changes, delete your lock, and restart from step 1.
Write the updated ledger.json to disk.

tasks.summary: Add full-text search to the contacts list with debounced input and server-side filtering.

outcome.summary: Search component with 300ms debounce, integrated with existing contacts API. Added SearchParams type to shared types.

notes.content: Considered using a third-party search component but built custom to stay consistent with existing UI patterns.

tasks.summary: Add search endpoint to contacts API with full-text PostgreSQL search and pagination.

outcome.summary: GET /api/contacts/search endpoint with q, limit, offset params. Uses PostgreSQL ts_vector for full-text search.

tasks.summary: Build a kanban-style pipeline view for deals, with drag-and-drop between stages.

notes.content: Using @dnd-kit/core for drag-and-drop since it has better accessibility support than react-beautiful-dnd.
Board layout done. Drag-and-drop wired up locally. Waiting on deal stages API to connect real data.

tasks.summary: API endpoints for deal pipeline stages: list stages, move deal between stages, reorder stages.
Fix CSV export producing garbled characters for contacts with non-ASCII names.

failure_log.approach: Switched CSV writer to use utf-8-sig encoding with BOM header for Excel compatibility.
failure_log.error: Fixed the encoding but broke the existing import pipeline which expects utf-8 without BOM. The import service is in infrastructure/ which is outside agent scope.

notes.content: This needs a coordinated change: export with BOM and update the import service to handle both. Import service is in infrastructure/ — needs human or a role with access to that scope.

tasks.summary: End-to-end test for the contact search flow: type query, see filtered results, clear search.
tasks.blocked_reason: Playwright test environment cannot connect to the test database. The DATABASE_URL in the test config appears to be pointing at a stale instance.

notes.content: Both dependent features are complete. Blocked purely on test environment config — likely needs human to update .env.test.

locks.reason: Adding DealStage and PipelineView types for the deal pipeline feature.
